productDisplayName: Levi's Men Printed Navy Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Levi's ups the ante of classic-yet-casual elegance with this T-shirt. Tailored to a beautiful finish, this tee is designed to offer a snug Fit and flaunt your chiseled body. Slip into black jeans and sneakers to complement this classic T-shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
